title: Person entity (candidate)
description: Source-agnostic record for one person who appeared on the ballot in one election. Identity is (election_id, ac_code, candidate_slug). Per-field provenance under field_provenance lets multiple adapters contribute different fields with different trust grades. Vote facts live on result.constituency artifacts; this file carries the biographics ECI Section 10 does not publish in machine-readable form.

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Identity (election_id, state, ac_code, candidate_slug), biographics (sex, age, education, profession, party_type), per-field provenance grade markers.

sources.description: Provenance per CLAUDE.md §12 / ADR-0002. Each entry is one upstream URL plus the timestamp our pipeline first ingested it. ECI is the authority for all election data; carrier-only inputs are not named.

name.description: Human-readable upstream name (e.g. "Statistical Report on General Election to Legislative Assembly of Tamil Nadu, 2021").

election_id.description: ECI election event id (e.g. AcGenApr2021). Matches result.constituency.election.

state.description: ECI state code (e.g. S22 for Tamil Nadu).

candidate_slug.description: Lowercase slug of candidate name, derived once at first emit and stable thereafter.

party_type.description: ECI's 5-bucket party classification (ECI codebook). Null when not declared.

sex.description: Normalised from ECI codebook values. Optional; null when not declared.

age.description: Candidate age at nomination. Lower bound 18 = constitutional minimum (Art. 173(b)). Null when not declared.

constituency_type.description: Seat reservation category. Null when not declared.

education.description: Indian credential ladder. Self-declared on Form-26 affidavit; no authority verifies. Optional; null when blank.

profession.description: Self-declared profession category. 17 verbatim values + null when blank. Class distinctions (Agriculture vs Agricultural Labour) preserved deliberately.

field_provenance.description: Per-field trust grade. Key = field name on this artifact; value carries the universal 4-tier grade (issuing_authority / sworn_declaration / third_party_curated / derived) plus the source_id (matches an entry in sources[]).

source_id.description: Identifier matching the publisher/adapter id (e.g. eci_html, eci_statreport). Never the carrier name.
